chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1357 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application 17.10.2025 Mr. Kher Muhammad, Advocate for Applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh ************ Learned Counsel for the Applicant after arguing the matter at some length, does not press this Criminal Bail Application and states that the directions may be given to learned Trial Court to conclude the trial and decide the subject case expeditiously. Such proposal is not opposed by learned Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. In view of above, this Criminal Bail Application is dismissed as not pressed. The expeditious trial is a right of an accused; therefore, the learned trial Court is directed to decide the subject case preferably within a period of two months positively from the date of receipt of this Order and to furnish such progress report to the MIT-II of this Court. The Applicant would be at liberty to file a fresh bail application before the Trial Court, if Trial Court fails to conclude the trial within stipulated period. Let a copy of this Order be communicated to learned Trial Court for information and compliance. JUDGE Qurban
